Header file for declaring the constructor of the InterruptIn class in JerryScript Mbed drivers.

# Purpose
This code is a C header file that defines a class constructor for `InterruptIn` within the JerryScript and mbed OS integration. It includes a preprocessor directive to prevent multiple inclusions of the header file, ensuring that the compiler processes it only once. The file includes the `wrap_tools.h` header from the `jerryscript-mbed-library-registry`, which likely provides necessary tools or macros for wrapping C++ classes for use in JerryScript. The `DECLARE_CLASS_CONSTRUCTOR(InterruptIn);` macro is used to declare the constructor for the `InterruptIn` class, facilitating its integration with the JerryScript engine.
